isolation.boundary: Local dashboard surface with seeded local data only

assertionResults.title: Resolution toggle and range presets work
assertionResults.reason: All contract checks passed with updated semantics: Daily/Weekly/Monthly each changed URL smoothing state, Daily rendered raw dots without line, Weekly used 7-day smoothing, Monthly used 30-day smoothing with equal daily cadence and visibly smoother line behavior than Weekly on trend strips (supported by API smoothing evidence), presets updated time window, and default was 30D + Weekly.

steps.action: Open /dashboard?view=trend in assigned session and inspect selected tabs
steps.observed: Trend loaded with 30D selected and Weekly selected (URL initially /dashboard?view=trend; default selected-state visible in screenshot).

steps.expected: URL smoothing parameter changes and chart shows raw dots only
steps.observed: URL updated to smoothing=daily. Daily render stats showed lines=0 and scatterSymbols=90 (raw points only across 3 strips).

steps.expected: URL smoothing parameter changes and chart shows 7-day rolling average
steps.observed: URL updated to smoothing=weekly. UI switched to line+raw overlay (lines=3, scatterSymbols=90). Supplemental API evidence returned smoothing=7d with smoothed series populated.

steps.expected: URL smoothing parameter changes and chart shows 30-day rolling average (same daily cadence allowed)
steps.observed: URL updated to smoothing=monthly. UI retained daily cadence with smoothed line+raw dots (lines=3, scatterSymbols=90). Supplemental API evidence returned smoothing=30d with same point count as weekly (104) and smoother line behavior for key metrics (RHR mean_abs_delta 0.3153 vs 0.5118 weekly; HRV 0.9445 vs 1.4422 weekly).
URL updated to range=7&smoothing=weekly and chart window changed accordingly.
URL updated to range=30&smoothing=weekly and chart window changed accordingly.
URL updated to range=90&smoothing=weekly and chart window changed accordingly.
URL updated to range=365&smoothing=weekly and chart window changed accordingly.

stepsTaken: Started agent-browser with required session id 31e06526ff84__u1, authenticated via local mock-auth __session cookie for user_test_001, and opened Trend view at /dashboard.
Captured screenshots for default, Daily, Weekly, Monthly, and range presets 7D/30D/90D/1Y plus monthly 1Y comparison state.
Recorded URL transitions for smoothing and range toggles and captured DOM render stats to confirm Daily raw-dot mode vs line modes.
Checked console errors (none) and captured supplemental authenticated curl evidence because agent-browser network capture returned no requests.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request capture returned no requests for trend API calls.
frictions.resolution: Collected equivalent authenticated curl request/response evidence for smoothing=none/7d/30d and saved summary plus raw responses.

summary: VAL-UITRD-003 passed: toggles and presets updated URL/time window correctly, Daily rendered raw dots without smoothed line, Weekly mapped to 7-day smoothing, Monthly mapped to 30-day smoothing with same cadence and smoother trend behavior evidence versus Weekly.
